file_name: Questionnaire - National Dental Care – business assets comprising the Comfy Dental clinic, Mandurah, WA.pdf

questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, including if National Dental Care and Comfy Dental Clinic are close competitors and there are few alternatives.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with National Dental Care and/or Comfy Dental Clinic.
